LESSON PLAN
Subject: Electrical Installation | Class: VOCATIONAL_ADVANCED | Board: NABTEB

Objective: By the end of this lesson, students will be able to recall the key concepts in Electrical Installation as specified by the NABTEB curriculum.

Activity: Students work in groups of four. Each group receives a scenario card based on a familiar Nigerian context. They must recall the relevant concept and present their findings to the class. Names used: Chidi, Fatima, Ngozi, Aminu, Taiwo, Adaeze.

Assessment: Exit quiz of five questions. Students scoring below 40% receive guided practice. Marks allocated per NABTEB continuous assessment guidelines.
